title: Universal Health (UHS) Q1 Earnings Miss Mark, Tumble Y/Y
text: Universal Health's (UHS) Q1 results reflect a steep expense level and lower admissions in its Behavioral Health Care Services segment, partially offset by revenue recognition.

title: Universal Health Services (UHS) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Universal Health Services (UHS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -12.96% and 2.25%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Universal Health Services Stock Plunges After Q1 Results, FY22 Outlook Cut Probability
text: Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) reported first-quarter revenue growth of 9.3% year-over-year to $3.29 billion, beating the consensus of $3.21 billion. The operating income declined by 21.2% Y/Y to $232.86 million, and the margin contracted by 274 bps to 7.1%.

title: Earnings Results: UHS stock drops more than 10% following earnings miss as higher wages eat into revenue
text: Universal Health Services Inc. shares dropped in the extended session Monday after the acute-care hospital operator's earnings fell short of Wall Street estimates as it has had to pay higher wages during a healthcare personnel shortage.

title: Universal Health (UHS) to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Universal Health Services' (UHS) first-quarter results are likely to reflect the benefits of increased admissions.
